---
title: "Contact & Collaboration"
page-layout: full
---

## Get in Touch

Interested in joining the SCVCS research initiative or exploring collaboration opportunities?

---

## Contact Information

::: grid
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### Email

**Project Coordinator**  
[scvcs@footprints.cv](mailto:scvcs@footprints.cv)

**Research Inquiries**  
[research@footprints.cv](mailto:research@footprints.cv)

**Partnership Opportunities**  
[partnerships@footprints.cv](mailto:partnerships@footprints.cv)

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6}

### Location

**Oxford Roadmap**  
University of Oxford  
Oxford, United Kingdom  

**Regional Hubs**  
🇵🇱 Poland  
🇵🇹 Portugal  
🇲🇾 Malaysia  

:::
:::

---

## Collaboration Opportunities

### Research Partnerships

If you represent a research institution with:
- Advanced semiconductor fabrication access
- Expertise in metrology, cybernetics, or policy
- Interest in sustainable supply chains

**→ [Email our Research Team](mailto:research@footprints.cv)**

### Industry & Manufacturing Partnerships

If you operate semiconductor fabrication lines or supply chain infrastructure:
- Pilot deployment opportunities
- Real-time compliance automation testing
- Customized governance frameworks

**→ [Email our Partnership Team](mailto:partnerships@footprints.cv)**

### Funding & Grant Opportunities

Interested in co-funding SCVCS development or scaling?
- EU Horizon Europe calls
- National research programs
- Regional development initiatives

**→ [Email our Coordinator](mailto:scvcs@footprints.cv)**

---

## Quick Links

- 📄 **[Project Details](project.qmd)**
- 👥 **[Team & Competencies](team.qmd)**
- 💻 **[GitHub Repository](https://github.com/oxfordroadmap/prj_SCVCS)**
- 📚 **[Documentation](#)** *(Coming soon)*

---

## Social & Web Presence

- 🐙 GitHub: [@oxfordroadmap](https://github.com/oxfordroadmap)
- 🔗 LinkedIn: [Oxford Roadmap](https://linkedin.com) *(To be updated)*
- 🌐 Web: [oxfordroadmap.org](https://oxfordroadmap.org) *(To be updated)*
